$comment: Hand-authored named sets of geo codes, $ref-able from indicator artifacts via `series_spec.expected_geographies = {"$ref": "universes.json#/universes/<key>"}`. Inline arrays remain allowed in indicator artifacts; this table is convenience for the common cases. Add entries opportunistically as new indicators land (e.g. pre_2014_states_only, CEA-35, J&K/Ladakh peer sets) rather than authoring exhaustively up front.

all_states_and_uts.description: All 28 states + 8 union territories using their current ECI codes. The most common universe for nation-wide socio-economic indicators (RBI Handbook of Statistics on Indian States, ICED state-wise dashboards, MoSPI national accounts state series). Source-of-truth for the geo code list is datasets/reference/in/states.json (state.kind in {state, union_territory}); this entry is the snapshot derived from it at universes.schema.json v1.0 creation. Re-verify against states.json on any future reorganisation.

states_only_no_ut.description: 28 states only (no union territories). Used when an indicator is published exclusively at the state level and union territories are not in scope (e.g. State Finances: A Study of Budgets, which excludes UTs without legislature). Source-of-truth derived from datasets/reference/in/states.json (state.kind == 'state').

union_only.description: Union (national-level) indicator. Used by indicators that exist only at the all-India level with no per-state breakdown (e.g. national CPI Combined, national WPI, India aggregate GDP at constant prices).
